name: Backend Spec Agent
description: Designs the API layer: routes, middleware, data-access patterns. Participates in the hard-barrier sync with the frontend before the integration step.

checks.pass: 📦 {count} existing packages found — backend will extend the monorepo
checks.fail: ℹ️  No packages/ dir — backend will be created at the repo root
recommendations: Keep the backend in packages/api or packages/server

checks.prompt: Design a REST API for the app boilerplate. Produce: (1) 3 example route definitions with method, path, and description. (2) suggest a middleware stack (auth, validation, error handling). Format as a structured list.
Based on the API spec, define the data models: list 2-3 TypeScript interfaces with fields and types. Context: {retryContext}
